series_metadata.series_title: Sexual Assault Examination Kit Statistics and Reports
series_metadata.series_description: Per ORC 2933.821, these records concern the required annual reporting by all governmental evidence-retention entities that receive, maintain, store, or preserve sexual assault examination kits to the Ohio Attorney General's Bureau of Criminal Investigation (AGO BCI) for an annual report to be published by the AGO. Records include, but are not limited to, information entered into the reporting system by governmental evidence-retention entities, correspondence with entities on reporting requirements, and the final annual report by the AGO.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 10 years from final report publication, fulfillment of ORC 149.11 requirements, and until no more administrative value. ; Paper: Retain 10 years from final report publication, fulfillment of ORC 149.11 requirements, and until no more administrative value. If scanned and saved electronically, dispose of paper immediately., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
